tasks.label: type-check
args: uv run ruff check && uv run mypy .

tasks.label: format
args: uv run ruff check --fix --select I && uv run ruff format

tasks.label: pytest
args: uv run pytest -v --cov=jsonpatchx --cov=tests --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=html; status=$?; echo "See HTML coverage here: file://${PWD}/htmlcov/index.html"; exit $status

tasks.label: pytest-matrix
args: uv run --managed-python -p 3.12 pytest && uv run --managed-python -p 3.13 pytest && uv run --managed-python -p 3.14 pytest
